title: Simple Realistic Pack
description: simple realistic texture pack 256 pixel that make minecraft little more simple and realistic
body:
This time I present you "Simple Realistic" pack.
its is a simple realistic texture pack
its change default texture into realistic but blocky texture
make woods , stone ,wools etc into realistic but still make it minecraft.
gives you real quality texture and make minecraft litte realistic.

Many Changes have done.

materials are:-

1)all doors
2)all Trapdoors
3)all Woods
4)all Logs
5)all Stripped Logs
6)all Stripped woods
7)all planks

This pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.

 

version supported
form- 1.16 TO Latest version

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files

 

Enjoy the "Simple Realistic Pack".

 

THANKS FOR DOWNLOADING.
